scripts.install:all: npm --prefix learning-app install && npm --prefix course-list-app install && npm --prefix lesson-detail-app install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix learning-app start" "npm --prefix course-list-app start" "npm --prefix lesson-detail-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix learning-app run build" "npm --prefix course-list-app run build" "npm --prefix lesson-detail-app run build"
